title: CVF Downstream Module Registry
description: Closed-schema machine source of source-verified runtime modules. Begins empty at bootstrap; an empty registry makes no roadmap or runtime capability claim. The status vocabulary is source-backed only - no value may represent plan-only intent - and every entry must carry evidence justifying its status.

path.description: Project-relative POSIX-style path. No drive letters, no backslashes, no path escape segments.

status.description: Source-backed only. ENFORCED: fully implemented and gated by tests/checks. PARTIAL: some enforcement exists now, not aspirational. CONTRACT_ONLY: a real, checked contract/schema/interface exists; behavior is not yet exercised. STUB: a minimal source placeholder exists. DEPRECATED: retired with a source-backed retirement record in `evidence`. Plan-only intent (e.g. PLANNED) is not representable.

evidence.description: Concrete, source-backed justification for the selected status: a file/line or test/gate reference. Never a plan, prompt, or provider-local memory claim.

dependencies.description: Each value must equal the id of another module already present in this registry.
